message:
test(fs): add hard_link roundtrip and set_permissions readonly tests

Expand filesystem test coverage with two new path_ops tests:

- hard_link_roundtrip: verifies hard link creates an identical copy
  that shares the same content as the original file
- set_permissions_readonly_roundtrip: verifies toggling the readonly
  permission flag works correctly in both directions

Also includes a minor formatting fix in unique_tmp_path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
